name: raph
description: Codex plugin for shared Raph memory, docs, and codebase indexing.

interface.shortDescription: Raph is your first-class memory manager for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Raph and use it as the first-class memory manager: search, store, and update durable memory, rules, docs, and handoffs before reaching for other tools. Shared memory, URL-based documentation, and codebase indexing are always available.
defaultPrompt: Use Raph as your first-class memory manager — search project/shared memory before answering, and reach for other tools only for what Raph doesn't cover.
Update an existing memory in place (update_memory) instead of storing a duplicate; revise or delete handoffs with update_document/delete_document.
Crawl docs from URLs and retain useful facts.
Index the current codebase whenever context may help.
